name: PILGRIMS PRIDE CORP
business: The company produces, processes, markets, and distributes fresh, frozen, and value-added chicken and pork products to retailers, distributors, and foodservice operators primarily in the U.S., Europe, and Mexico.

exposures.sentence: Pilgrim s Pride Corporation (referred to herein as Pilgrim s, PPC, the Company, we, us, our, or similar terms) is primarily engaged in the production, processing, marketing and distribution of fresh, frozen and value-added chicken and pork products to retailers, distributors and foodservice operators.

Some of the more significant owned or licensed trademarks used by the Company or its affiliates include Pilgrim s , Just Bare , Gold n Plump , Gold Kist , Country Pride , Pierce Chicken , Pilgrim s Mexico, To-Ricos , Del Dia , Moy Park, Matteson s, Richmond, Fridge Raiders and Denny.

catalysts.sentence: We anticipate spending between $900 million and $950 million on the acquisition of property, plant and equipment in 2026.
